query: nxt: AI productivity tool launched on Product Hunt July 3 2026 review

results.title: Best of Product Hunt: July 3, 2026
results.content:
6. nxt - Talk to your to do list and get what's next
   - Description: nxt is the AI task manager you talk to like a human assistant. Brain-dump your thoughts in plain language - nxt reads between the lines, extracts tasks, infers priorities, and files everything automatically. It understands what you mean, not just what you say. nxt learns your personal context, so your tasks flex around your life. When you're ready to act, nxt cuts through the noise and gives you one clear task, one reason why. No scrolling, no paralysis, no overwhelming list to wade through.
   - Score: 145
   - Comments: 40
   - Product Hunt page: 
   - External URL: 
   - Launch tags: Productivity, Task Management, Artificial Intelligence
7. Vox - Voice in, voice out — with GitHub Copilot [...] - Launch tags: Mac, Productivity, Developer Tools
   - Categories: Toys, Games
4. Osloq - An AI agent that reproduces GitHub issues for you
   - Description: Most AI dev tools just read your code and guess. Osloq actually runs it. Connect your GitHub, pick an issue, and an AI agent spins up a real sandbox, clones your repo, runs it, and tries to reproduce the bug the way a developer would. You get a report backed by real evidence. What happened, the steps it took, and whether the bug is real, not a hallucinated guess. No local setup, no "works on my machine." It handles the tedious reproduction step so you jump straight to fixing.
   - Score: 199
   - Comments: 54
   - Product Hunt page: 
   - External URL: 
   - Launch tags: Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub [...] 1. Glaze by Raycast - Create your own Mac apps by chatting with AI
   - Description: Glaze is the easiest way to go from an idea to a Mac app. Describe what you want, and it builds a real app that lives in your dock, launches instantly, works offline, and taps into the full power of your computer. Software that's finally personal, shaped around you. From the makers of Raycast.
   - Score: 466
   - Comments: 81
   - Product Hunt page: 
   - External URL: 
   - Launch tags: Mac, Productivity, Artificial Intelligence
   - Categories: Productivity
2. Goals from Loops - Measure whether a campaign drove the desired outcome
   - Description: A better way to send marketing and transactional email.
   - Score: 286
   - Comments: 37
   - Product Hunt page: 
   - External URL:

nxt is the AI task manager you talk to like a human assistant. Brain-dump your thoughts in plain language - nxt reads between the lines, extracts tasks, infers priorities, and files everything automatically. It understands what you mean, not just what you say. nxt learns your personal context, so your tasks flex around your life. When you're ready to act, nxt cuts through the noise and gives you one clear task, one reason why. No scrolling, no paralysis, no overwhelming list to wade through.

# nxtAlternatives

Love chatting with nxt to see what's next? Try Twos, a simple hub for notes and tasks, or Todoist, renowned for cross‑platform projects and collaboration. For AI‑assisted schedules, BeforeSunset AI adapts plans in real time, while Things and Superlist shine with elegant, list‑first organization.

results.title: nxt: Talk to your to do list and get what's next | Product Hunt
results.content:
Maker

@evketgkb4nxt picks up your timezone automatically on setup so that side just works. The more interesting scheduling magic is what it does with natural language - things like "pay the window cleaner the first Monday of each month" or "dance class at 5pm every other Thursday starting this week" just get handled.
